# saveGraph

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the saveGraph mutation

## Usage

```bash
csdk save-graph --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.graphId <UUID> --input.rootHash <UUID> --input.message <String>
```

## Examples
